ab: Hmuya ka karac jiyax sayang hug?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: Mskuy hari ka karac, imah egu hari mtalux qsiya.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝點熱水。

ab: Hmuya ka karac jiyax sayang hug?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Mtalux hari ka karac, imah egu hari qsiya.
ch: B:天氣有點熱，要多喝點水。
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Hmuya ka karac nganguc hug?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Paru balay ka hidaw, iya suqi thidaw.
ch: B:太陽很大，不要曬太久太陽。
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Hmuya ka karac nganguc hug?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Egu bi ka rulung, ungac qtaan karac ka hidaw.
ch: B:雲很多，天空看不到太陽。
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: Hmuya ka karac kusun?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Peungac hidaw ka kusun, egu bi ka rulung, paru bi ka bgihur.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Hmuya ka karac siida?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: Siida o pskuy hari, musa nganguc o plkusi wagi.
ch: B:那天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: Hmuya ka karac jiyax sngayan?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Malu karac ka jiyax sngayan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: Pquyux ka jiyax siida hug?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Siida o musa malu karac, uxay pquyux.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: Pquyux ka jiyax siida hug?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Iq! Pquyux ka jiyax siida.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: Gaga qmuyux ka sayang hug?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Msuwal da! Smriyu ka hidaw da!
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: Gaga qmuyux hug?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Qmuyux da! Ini ku adas bubung!
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: Gaga qmuyux ka nganguc hug?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: Ini quyux ka sayang, babaw nkan do pquyux da, musa nganguc o adas bubung.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶雨傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: Pskuy ka misan hkawas hug?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Iq! Pskuy balay ka misan hkawas, plkusi egu lukus.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: Pktalux bi ka rbagan hngkawas nii hug?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Iq! Pktalux balay ka rbagan, mahi egu hari qsiya.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: Smkuxul su karac srnabaw hug?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: Smkuxul ku karac srnabaw, yasa muxul balay ka karac.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，因為天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: Smkuxul su karac krpuhan hug?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: Ini ku skuxul karac krpuhan, yasa egu bgihur paru ka karac krpuhan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
